transcript:
CALLER: Hello, mujhe apni medicines ka refill chahiye tha. Main Dr. Sinha ka patient hoon.
AGENT: Ji zaroor. Aapka naam aur registered mobile number bata sakte hain?
CALLER: Haan, Mahesh Tiwari. Number hai 9765432100.
AGENT: Thank you Mr. Tiwari. Main aapka record dekh raha hoon... Dr. Sinha ne last month Metformin aur Atorvastatin prescribe ki thi. Kya inhi ka refill chahiye?
CALLER: Haan haan, yehi dono. Kab mil sakti hain?
AGENT: Main Dr. Sinha ke paas refill request bhej deta hoon. Approval ke baad hum aapko call karenge — usually 24 ghante mein hota hai. Pharmacy se aap directly le sakte hain ya home delivery bhi available hai.
CALLER: Achha theek hai. Home delivery prefer karunga.
AGENT: Note kar liya. Confirmation SMS aayegi jab prescription ready hogi. Koi aur help chahiye?
CALLER: Nahin, bas itna hi. Shukriya.
AGENT: Aapka swagat hai, Mr. Tiwari!
